# cacheModel

**Instance Property**

The cache model for the web views associated with the receiver.

## Declaration

```swift
var cacheModel: WebCacheModel { get set }
```

## Discussion

Possible values are described in [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebCacheModel].

Set this property to optimize WebKit’s cache footprint (on disk and in memory) to best fit the use of the web view. If a web view is used only for a single webpage, use the [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WebCacheModel/documentViewer] constant instead.

## Caching

- **usesPageCache**: A Boolean that indicates whether the web views associated with the receiver should use the shared page cache.
